name: IdempotencyAndLogicalEffectIdentity
description: Atomic replay outcomes plus domain-level uniqueness for evidence registration and Reconciliation Decision.
schema_def: idempotency_record: key, operationId, canonicalRequestHash, actor, state committed, stableResult, committedAt; unique key. Same key and request returns the stored logical result; changed operation or request conflicts. evidence logical identity: kind plus privacy-safe digest unique for one real item, with optional content fingerprint conflict guard. Identical logical evidence registered under a different request key returns the existing record and, for atomic transaction capture, the existing actively linked transaction outcome; it never creates another fact. A changed observation or financial fact conflicts. reconciliation logical identity: evidenceId plus active disposition scope and decision predecessor; confirm, reject, revoke, replace, and coverage completion each have stable uniqueness. Domain effect and request outcome commit together; filesystem artifacts reconcile from committed database state after crashes.
